overrideReason: AUDIT-20260623-05 (only genuine open residual) is the FR-017 honest-boundary on the record-without-merge side: workflow advance --apply records status:shipped without merge-evidence. The 9 core findings (AUDIT-01/02/03/04/06/07/08/09/11) are fixed RED-first; the backstop-wiring generator (06/08) is closed compiler-enforced (required computeVerdict backstop args + shared precondition); AUDIT-10 is a chunked-audit false positive (no-shortcuts-audit.ts exists). Deterministic floor: 2624 tests green, tsc clean. Diminishing-returns plateau diagnosed (HIGH 2/2/2/1/2/2; rounds 5-6 only boundary/false-positive/prose) per spec-audit-diminishing-returns.
